feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Product Compliance - Collaboration within the supply chain - Campaign
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have a question. Is there a simalar funtionality available in Public Cloud as is available in Private Cloud for "Collaboration within the supply chain - Campaign" as descibed in SAP Help

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ff6d35a34fbe4bea99e4ac41b0d5db03/43dff3ce269f453ca7940e9b2088a8a3.html?locale=en-US 

My customer want's to send messages/email to his suppliers to request article-related compliance data such as declarable substances for discrete products regarding regulatory lists as well as company-related compliance requirements.

entry.title: Resource not found for segment 'Purchaseorder'" in Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am encountering the following error while using the POST method for Purchase Order in Postman. Although I am passing all the required entities, the error persists. Additionally, the error message does not specify which segment is missing, and there is no further clarification available in the "OData Error App."

I am struggling to resolve this issue and have attached a screenshot of the error for reference. Has anyone else faced a similar issue?

Error: Resource not found for segment 'Purchaseorder'

Looking forward to any insights.

Regards

Janarthanan

meetjana@hotmail.com

entry.title: Exchange Rate Source for Journal Entries in Foreign Currency
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

When creating a journal entry with a transaction currency different from the company code currency, where does the exchange rate come from? I have noticed that there are no rates maintained in the Currency Exchange Rate app.

Could you please clarify the source of the exchange rate in this scenario?

entry.title: Deep dive into the Fit-to-Standard Workshops to streamline SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud Implementation
entry.content:
Fit-to-Standard Workshops have emerged as a pivotal element in streamlining SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud implementations. These workshops provide a structured approach to aligning business processes with SAP's best practices, ensuring a smoother and more efficient transition.

In this deep dive, we will explore the intricacies o Fit-to-Standard Workshops, shedding light on how they can significantly enhance your SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud journey.

Level 1: Fit-to-Standard (High-Level Overview)

  • Purpose: To provide an initial high-level review of SAP's standard processes and functionality.
  • Details: This is typically a broad and general overview where you will identify the key business areas (e.g., finance, procurement, sales) and examine how SAP’s standard features map to those areas.
  • Content: The team would explain the major processes in SAP (like order-to-cash, procure-to-pay, etc.) and how they align with the organization's requirements at a very high level.
  • Outcome: It is expected that the team will identify key gaps or customization needs, but the focus is more on alignment and understanding if the business processes can be supported without deep configuration changes.
  • Detail Level: Minimal, with an emphasis on alignment and understanding. At this stage, you would generally not be making decisions yet.

Level 2: Fit-to-Standard (Detailed Process Walkthrough)

  • Purpose: To dive deeper into specific business processes and how they will be executed within the SAP system.
  • Details: This session gets into more detail, where functional experts from both the business side and SAP consultants assess specific business processes in SAP. They go through each process step-by-step to identify potential gaps or needed enhancements.
  • Content: Each business process (such as order entry, invoice processing, or inventory management) will be reviewed in more depth, with a focus on how SAP’s standard functionality meets those requirements. Customization and configuration needs are explored more deeply.
  • Outcome: Gaps are identified, but solutions are also discussed—whether a configuration change can resolve the gap or if a custom development is needed. The goal is to finalize the understanding of the process and the level of adjustment required.
  • Detail Level: High, focusing on specific functionalities and features in SAP and how they will work for the organization.

Level 3: Fit-to-Standard (Very Detailed, Solution-Oriented)

  • Purpose: To finalize the detailed mapping between SAP's functionality and the business requirements and finalize decisions on any gaps or customizations.
  • Details: This level focuses on very granular details, down to configuration settings, business rules, and potential areas for custom developments. This stage ensures that the configuration of the SAP system is aligned precisely with business needs and that all gaps are thoroughly identified.
  • Content: Detailed process flows will be reviewed, often using case studies, test scenarios, and prototypes to validate whether SAP can fulfill the requirements as is, or if there will be a need for complex configurations or custom development. Integration points with other systems may also be reviewed.
  • Outcome: The final configuration decisions are made, and a clear plan is put in place for any customization or adjustments needed. Key deliverables might include detailed configuration specifications and documentation.
  • Detail Level: Very high, focused on resolving every single gap, configuration issue, or customization that could arise in the implementation.

In summary:

  • Level 1: High-level, broad review of business processes and alignment with SAP standard.
  • Level 2: Detailed examination of key business processes to identify gaps or customization needs.
  • Level 3: Highly detailed, solution-oriented discussions to finalize configurations and customizations

#SAP #S4Hana #CloudImplementation #FitToStandard #DigitalTransformation #BusinessProcess #ERP #CloudSolutions #SAPWorkshops

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud 公司代碼長度是否可以調整?
entry.content:
公司代碼目前的長度為4，且有限制後兩碼須為【英文】
請問，是否可以調整長度與編碼限制？

entry.title: Payment Method not viewable in APP Manage Supplier Line
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Doing a list for the open items in Manage Supplier Line and adding the payment method field I cant see which one taken in the posting, (taking in account the payment method was be assigned in vendor master data from the supplier). Our client is asking why is not possible the function since is important for the payment analysis previous execute the payment run (automatic payment program).

Below a screen of the situation previosly explained.

#sappubliccloud #finance #paymentmethod @vendorlist

entry.title: Cant download history and processor information in verify journal entry app in S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
We need your help to know the process how to get extract of history and processor information in verify journal entry app in public cloud. Verify journal entry app display history and processor detials on main screen but when we are trying to download we cant see this field in downloaded file.

Thanks.

entry.title: DCD1 condition type is getting determined for US company codes
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

DCD1 ( Cash Discount ) condition type is getting determined for US company codes based on the payment maintained in the preliminary billing document or the payment terms in the customer master.

entry.title: Managing Multiple Material Numbers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
I am working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public implementation project and have the following scenario:

My client needs to manage a single material with three different material numbers. In their current process, they use both internal and external numbering simultaneously for materials. Specifically, they have an internal material number that groups different external material numbers from suppliers for the same material.

Example:

  • Material: Finished Product
  • Internal Material Number: 1
  • External Material Number from Supplier 1: SKU001
  • External Material Number from Supplier 2: SKU002

When creating purchase orders, buyers are used to requesting materials using the supplier’s external material number (SKU001 or SKU002), and reports and analytics are also based on this external numbering. However, suppliers frequently change their SKUs, even though the material itself remains the same.

Given this scenario, what options are available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public to manage multiple material numbers while maintaining material traceability? 

I appreciate any guidance on how to handle this requirement in the system.

entry.title: #CoE#HSQC if app Upload Material Inventory Price can change inventory price for special stock
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

One question about app Upload Material Inventory Price.

We want mass change special stock inventory price, if app Upload Material Inventory Price can support us do this. If yes , how should we modify the upload template. we try to add two column, one sales document ,the other is item(SD), But failed show us error.

Thanks

entry.title: eInvoice (India) details on Invoice form
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have implemented S4 HANA Public Cloud System. We have business requirement  to send invoice forms with eInvoice details (for India) like IRN number and QR code as soon as billing document is created through an email/SMS instantaneously to a customer. 

Once the invoice document, billing output generated instantly. If eInvoice is not triggered for it or eInvoice processing takes time, eInvoice details are missing from billing form.

Can you please let me know how to achieve this where as soon as billing document is created, email will be triggered to customer with eInvoice details without any delay and manual intervention.

entry.title: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Recently am working in delivery note form, where we need to convert item delivered into some quantities, I have explored all badi available in public cloud for delivery item. I have checked using custom tracing, no badi is triggering .while executing "display outbound delivery" . Can you suggest if any BADI available for item level in outbound delivery.

Please note, I have added BADI for header level.(LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD)

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: How can we view the status of the database and backup status in Grow with SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to check the database size, database version, and backup status, but we are unable to find any Fiori app to retrieve this information. Could you please suggest how we can view the database status?

entry.title: How to manually import Customer/Supplier invoice
entry.content:
Is there any way to manually create 'Accounts receivable/payable open item items' from other apps (rather than using 'Migrate Your Data' application)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4HANA Public Cloud - CBO Upsert Error 'Expected type is 'Edm.Boolean''
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying an upsert to a custom CBO but the expected types are sort of strange.

 

It does not accept the values a GET request response.
Also numeric is not accepted as '1.00' but 1.00m

Example for the error:

https://xxxx/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_API_TEST_CDS/YY1_API_TESTSap_upsert?NumericID='0000000001'&SAP_Description='API-Test'&Amount_V=2.00m&Amount_C='Amount_C'&TextToChange='AV'&Quantity_V=9.99m&Quantity_U='G'&CheckBox=true

CheckBox = true is not considered as boolean, nor is 'true' or 'X' or 1 or whatever.

Has anyone solved this?

entry.title: Aging Report for Accounts Payable not working
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are encountering an issue when attempting to open the Aging Report for Accounts Payable app. The following error message appears:

"It seems that your profile is not configured for the system.
Contact your system administrator or end the current session and try again later.
Notify the system administrator
End session"

Despite having the necessary role assigned, we are still unable to access the app. Could you please advise on the possible cause of this issue and any recommended steps for resolution?

Thank you for your support.
